name: Intuitive Surgical
confidenceReason: Unmatched surgical robotics monopoly with 9,000+ installed da Vinci systems. Razor-and-blade recurring revenue. But premium valuation limits upside.
bullCase: Dominant surgical robotics platform with 9,000+ installed systems globally. Razor-and-blade model: instruments and accessories are ~70% of revenue. da Vinci 5 upgrade cycle drives procedure growth. Expanding into new surgical categories. Deep moat from surgeon training and hospital integration.
bearCase: 62x trailing PE leaves no room for error. Competition from Medtronic Hugo and J&J Ottava emerging. Procedure growth could decelerate as penetration matures. Large cap limits upside magnitude.

cagrModel.basis: GAAP EPS; premium monopoly warrants above-market PE; bear assumes compression to 35x
